generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 New security measures are being debated in Congress, and it's crucial we get this right. While some worry about civil liberties, the truth is our current systems are outdated and leave us vulnerable. Just last month, a major city's emergency response system was hacked during a crisis - imagine if that happened during a real disaster. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. Stronger domestic security powers would give us the tools to prevent these threats while maintaining our freedoms. #NationalSecurityMatters #SafetyFirst
